title: Fix 'has type DOT' error when passing colon-colon parameter types

features.name: class type parameter
features.description: Code should include a class with a type parameter that defaults to logic

features.name: scoped type reference via scope resolution operator
features.description: Code should include a scoped type reference using the :: operator to access a typedef from a class

features.name: type parameter with scoped type value
features.description: Code should include a class type parameter being assigned a value using the scoped :: operator
